description:
As a QA engineer reviewing the feature ticket,
  I want to verify whether the API response matches the acceptance criteria,
  So that any contract divergences are formally identified and documented.

  IMPORTANT: These scenarios test the contract described in the feature ticket.
  The current API implementation does NOT meet these criteria.
  All scenarios in this file are tagged @known-failure and are EXPECTED TO FAIL.
  See docs/divergence-report.md for the full divergence analysis.

  Acceptance Criteria from Ticket:
    - The response includes: Date, Activity name, Rank (1–10), Reasoning
    - It ranks each day for each activity based on weather suitability

elements.name: Response contains entries for each of the 7 forecast days

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the response should contain activity entries for 7 days

result.error_message:
AssertionError: expected { Object (activities, snapshot) } to have property 'rankings'
    at CustomWorld.<anonymous> (C:\Users\douglas.garcia_omni\Documents\activity-ranking-api-test-automation\tests\steps\activities.steps.ts:146:26)

elements.name: Each activity has a rank between 1 and 10

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
each activity should have a "rank" field

result.error_message:
AssertionError: expected { …(2) } to have property 'rank'
    at CustomWorld.<anonymous> (C:\Users\douglas.garcia_omni\Documents\activity-ranking-api-test-automation\tests\steps\activities.steps.ts:163:31)

steps.name: each activity rank should be an integer between 1 and 10

elements.name: Each activity includes a reasoning field

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
each activity should have a "reasoning" field

result.error_message:
AssertionError: expected { …(2) } to have property 'reasoning'
    at CustomWorld.<anonymous> (C:\Users\douglas.garcia_omni\Documents\activity-ranking-api-test-automation\tests\steps\activities.steps.ts:163:31)

steps.name: each reasoning should be a non-empty string

elements.name: Response includes date field for each activity ranking

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
each activity entry should have a "date" field

result.error_message:
AssertionError: expected { …(2) } to have property 'date'
    at CustomWorld.<anonymous> (C:\Users\douglas.garcia_omni\Documents\activity-ranking-api-test-automation\tests\steps\activities.steps.ts:204:29)

steps.name: each date should be a valid ISO date string

name: Activity Ranking API — Acceptance Criteria Validation

description:
As a QA engineer,
  I want to verify the activities API handles invalid inputs correctly,
  So that consumers receive meaningful error responses.

elements.name: Missing lat and lon returns 400 error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings without any parameters
the response status should be 400
the response error message should be "lat & lon required"

elements.name: Invalid coordinates return an error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude 999.0 and longitude 999.0
the response should indicate an activities failure

elements.name: Missing lat parameter returns error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings with only longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 400

elements.name: Missing lon parameter returns error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings with only latitude -20.71889
the response status should be 400

name: Activity Ranking API — Error Handling and Edge Cases

description:
As a user viewing activity rankings,
  I want to receive a ranked list of activities based on weather conditions,
  So that I can plan my trip accordingly.

  Note: These tests validate the ACTUAL API behavior (aggregated scores),
  which differs from the acceptance criteria in the feature ticket.
  See docs/divergence-report.md for details.

elements.name: Valid coordinates return exactly 4 activities

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the response should contain exactly 4 activities

elements.name: Activities include all expected types

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the activities should include "Skiing"
the activities should include "Surfing"
the activities should include "Outdoor Sightseeing"
the activities should include "Indoor Sightseeing"

elements.name: Each activity has a score between 0 and 1

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
each activity score should be between 0 and 1

elements.name: Response includes snapshot with weather summary fields

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the snapshot should contain avg_temp, max_precip, total_snowfall, avg_cloud, max_wind

elements.name: Activities are sorted by score in descending order

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
activities should be sorted by score in descending order

elements.name: Snapshot values are numerically plausible

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request activity rankings for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the snapshot avg_temp should be between -60 and 60
the snapshot max_wind should be a non-negative number

name: Activity Ranking API — Successful Requests (Real Behavior)

description:
As a user of the Activity Ranking system,
  I want to search for a city, get its weather, and see ranked activities,
  So that the full user journey works seamlessly from search to results.

elements.name: Full flow from city search to activity ranking

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "London"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty
I select the first suggestion and store its coordinates
I request weather data using the stored coordinates
the response status should be 200
the daily data should contain exactly 7 entries
I request activity rankings using the stored coordinates
the response status should be 200
the response should contain exactly 4 activities

elements.name: Suggest result coordinates are valid for downstream APIs

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "Berlin"
I select the first suggestion and store its coordinates
the stored latitude should be between -90 and 90
the stored longitude should be between -180 and 180
I request weather data using the stored coordinates
the response status should be 200
I request activity rankings using the stored coordinates
the response status should be 200

name: End-to-End Flow — City Search to Activity Ranking

description:
As a QA engineer,
  I want to verify the API handles invalid inputs gracefully,
  So that the system remains robust under unexpected usage.

elements.name: Empty query parameter returns 400 error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with an empty query
the response status should be 400
the response error message should be "query required"

elements.name: Missing query parameter returns 400 error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions without query parameter
the response status should be 400
the response error message should be "query required"

elements.name: Non-existent city returns empty results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "xyznonexistent99"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should be empty

elements.name: Single character query returns empty results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "a"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should be empty

elements.name: Special characters in query are handled gracefully

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "!@#$%"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should be empty

name: City Suggestion API — Error Handling and Edge Cases

description:
As a user searching for a city,
  I want to receive autocomplete suggestions as I type,
  So that I can quickly find and select the correct city.

elements.name: Search with exact city name returns matching results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "Votuporanga"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty
at least one suggestion should have the name "Votuporanga"

elements.name: Partial query returns autocomplete suggestions

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "lon"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty
at least one suggestion should have the name "London"

elements.name: Each suggestion contains all required fields

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "Paris"
the response status should be 200
each suggestion should have the fields: id, name, country, admin1, lat, lon, timezone

elements.name: Suggestion coordinates are within valid geographic ranges

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "Tokyo"
the response status should be 200
each suggestion latitude should be between -90 and 90
each suggestion longitude should be between -180 and 180

elements.name: Valid query returns a non-empty array of suggestions

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "New"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty

elements.name: Multiple valid cities return results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "London"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty

elements.name: Multiple valid cities return results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "São Paulo"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty

elements.name: Multiple valid cities return results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "New York"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty

elements.name: Multiple valid cities return results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "Berlin"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty

elements.name: Multiple valid cities return results

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I search for city suggestions with query "Sydney"
the response status should be 200
the suggestions list should not be empty

name: City Suggestion API — Successful Requests

description:
As a QA engineer,
  I want to verify the weather API handles missing or invalid parameters correctly,
  So that consumers receive clear error messages.

elements.name: Missing lat and lon returns 400 error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data without any parameters
the response status should be 400
the response error message should be "lat & lon required"

elements.name: Missing lat parameter returns error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data with only longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 400

elements.name: Missing lon parameter returns error

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data with only latitude -20.71889
the response status should be 400

name: Weather Forecast API — Error Handling and Edge Cases

description:
As a user who selected a city,
  I want to receive a 7-day weather forecast for that location,
  So that the system can rank activities based on weather conditions.

elements.name: Valid coordinates return a 7-day weather forecast

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the daily data should contain exactly 7 entries
the hourly data should contain exactly 168 entries

elements.name: Response includes all expected hourly data fields

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the hourly data should include fields: time, temperature_2m, precipitation, weathercode, windspeed_10m, cloudcover, snowfall, snow_depth

elements.name: Response includes all expected daily data fields

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the daily data should include fields: time, sunrise, sunset, temperature_2m_max, temperature_2m_min, precipitation_sum

elements.name: Response includes geographic metadata

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the response should include timezone information
the response should include an elevation value

elements.name: Hourly units describe correct measurement types

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
the hourly time unit should be "iso8601"

elements.name: Daily time entries are valid ISO date strings

steps.name: the Activity Ranking API is available
I request weather data for latitude -20.71889 and longitude -46.60972
the response status should be 200
each daily time entry should be a valid date string

name: Weather Forecast API — Successful Requests
